name: ft09_win=match_active_panel_to_reference

Clicking (ACTION6) toggles tiles / moves the pinwheel within the active panel. HYPOTHESIS (win predicate): win = set the ACTIVE panel tile pattern to MATCH a reference panel (most-likely one of the 3 unbordered panels), i.e. a copy/pattern-match objective. UNCERTAIN which reference and whether a transform (rotation/reflection) applies; ALTERNATIVES the frames cannot rule out: (a) make all four panels identical; (b) active = a dihedral transform of a reference; (c) a parity/count rule over the tiles. This is a STALL game (survives to cap, 0 reward under generic organs); the win predicate is game-specific and NOT determinable from observation without guessing the target.
